    Index

    M

    model - Variable in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    model is an instance of Model class, whose public methods will be tested here.
    ModelJUnitTest - Class in pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test
    ModelJUnitTest is a class consisting of multiple test methods for the Model class.
    ModelJUnitTest() - Constructor for class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    ModelJUnitTest is an empty constructor.

    P

    pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test - package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test
    Contains ModelJUnitTest test class with parametrized tests.

    S

    setUp() - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    setUp method is a method that initiates the new Model instance before each test.

    T

    testRailFenceCorrect(String, String, int, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testRailFenceCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
    testRailFenceCorrectHistory(String, String, int, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testRailFenceCorrectHistory is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
    testRailFenceIncorrect(String, String, int, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testRailFenceIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
    testRailFenceNoMode(String, int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testRailFenceNoMode is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without mode set.
    testRailFenceNoModeOneRail(String, int, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testRailFenceNoModeOneRail is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without mode set, but with one rail.
    testRailFenceNoRails(String, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testRailFenceNoRails is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without rails set.
    testSetModeCorrect(String, String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetModeCorrect is a method that tests whether the method Model.setMode(java.lang.String) method correctly converts the input mode into lowercase mode.
    testSetModeIncorrect(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetModeIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setMode(java.lang.String) for incorrect option.
    testSetNoOfRailsCorrect(String, int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetNoOfRailsCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
    testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect(String, int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
    testSetNoOfRailsNoText(int) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetNoOfRailsNoText is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
    testSetTextCorrect(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetTextCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setText(java.lang.String).
    testSetTextIncorrect(String) - Method in class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.test.ModelJUnitTest
    testSetTextIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setText(java.lang.String).
